scan_scope_note: External/local evidence roots only; generated Aureon grant ledgers are excluded to reduce false positive route-term hits.

why_no_submission: The re-check found metadata candidates and supporting material, but no confirmed signed partner commitment, eligible lead acceptance, budget, permit, site, facility, farming lead, TTO support, export-control determination or finance evidence.
Candidate filenames or generic content hits are not sufficient to complete or submit an IFS application.
No private finance or credential content was copied into this artifact.

controls: Metadata and route-term hits only; no sensitive content copied.
No IFS portal field was changed.
No external email or contact route was used.
No candidate hit is treated as confirmed unlock evidence without route-specific signed/dated proof.
